title: Front View of Mannequin Wearing Asymmetric Skirt and Minimalist Top
description: Square format studio image of a mannequin dressed in a white asymmetric skirt with an uneven hemline paired with a dark long-sleeve minimalist top. The mannequin is accessorized with simple jewelry and nude heels, standing against a neutral plain background. The photo highlights the garment's texture and silhouette with balanced studio lighting, suitable for fashion retail and social media presentation.
